com.github.copilot.rpc

    SessionHooks
    SessionHooks.setOnPostToolUse(PostToolUseHandler onPostToolUse)
    Sets the handler called after a tool has been executed.
    SessionHooks
    SessionHooks.setOnPostToolUseFailure(PostToolUseFailureHandler onPostToolUseFailure)
    Sets the handler called after a tool execution whose result was a failure.
    SessionHooks
    SessionHooks.setOnPreMcpToolCall(PreMcpToolCallHandler onPreMcpToolCall)
    Sets the handler called before an MCP tool call is dispatched to an MCP server.
    SessionHooks
    SessionHooks.setOnPreToolUse(PreToolUseHandler onPreToolUse)
    Sets the handler called before a tool is executed.
    SessionHooks
    SessionHooks.setOnSessionEnd(SessionEndHandler onSessionEnd)
    Sets the handler called when a session ends.
    SessionHooks
    SessionHooks.setOnSessionStart(SessionStartHandler onSessionStart)
    Sets the handler called when a session starts.
    SessionHooks
    SessionHooks.setOnUserPromptSubmitted(UserPromptSubmittedHandler onUserPromptSubmitted)
    Sets the handler called when the user submits a prompt.
